tracks.rawText: 2:52La vida pasa el tiempo vuelav5A mid-tempo Latin pop-rock ballad in B minor at 95 BPM, characterized by a prominent rhythmic acoustic guitar strumming pattern, The arrangement features a clean electric guitar providing melodic fills and a driving bassline that locks with a standard pop drum kit, The song structure follows a Verse-Chorus-Verse-Chorus-Bridge-Chorus-Outro format, The male vocals are expressive and passionate, utilizing a wide range from a chest-heavy baritone in the verses to a soaring, high-tenor belt in the choruses with subtle vibrato, The production is polished with a natural room reverb on the drums and a slight delay on the lead vocals during the climactic sections, Harmonic progression centers around i - VI - III - VII in the verses, shifting to a more expansive progression in the chorus to enhance the emotional liftPublishRemix
tracks.title: La vida pasa el tiempo vuela

tracks.rawText: 3:41Untitledv5The track launches with lush aquatic synth pads and submerged arpeggios, gradually layering in a pulsing four-on-the-floor beat, Metallic percussion and deep sub-bass add texture, while filtered melodic motifs evoke a sense of mystery, The breakdown features washed-out reverb and bubbling sound design, before driving back into a hypnotic, dancefloor-ready groove2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Untitled

tracks.rawText: 2:36Yeah yeah…v5Reggae clásico de los años 80 con influencias dancehall, ritmo relajado pero enérgico, bajo profundo y cálido, batería con patrón one-drop, guitarra rítmica con staccato, arreglos con teclados tipo órgano jamaicano y toques de sintetizador vintage, voces melódicas y expresivas con estilo caribeño, atmósfera festiva y positiva, mezcla con sensación analógica y reverb espacialrede1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Yeah yeah…
